channel.title: Personal on Kelly and Coffee
channel.description: Recent content in Personal on Kelly and Coffee

item.title: Wortelkanaal is niet sexy
item.description: Ik heb al even wat last van een tand; mijn rechterpremolaar bovenaan. Jaren geleden werd hier best intensief aan gewerkt, alleen dacht ik dat de toenmalige tandarts die tand had ontzenuwd. Maar nope, want dan zou het echt niet geëindigd zijn zoals het liep. De tand werd mooi uitgeboord, alleen werd mijn zenuw aangeboord (let me tell you; no drugs can knock out that pain jolt there) en na de boodschap dat mijn tand ‘ineens bloedde’ vulde de tansdarts mijn tand.

item.title: Studying while working fulltime
item.description: I’ve recently changed employer; I swapped insurance for transport. I went from MS Amlin to Lineas; I now help drive a ‘Freight Force’. Lineas is fairly scattered right now; but it offers me so much potential growth. A new job also means learning new things; a lot of new things.

item.title: Married
item.description: On Aug 13th 2021 I got married to the love of my life, Ziggy.

item.title: A day in the life of a remote worker
item.description: Recently, I was asked what my day looks like during this pandemic as it rendered me (like so many others) a full-time remote worker. People assume my days are very relax, laid back and filed with breaks. I honestly hate to burst their bubbles; but I generally have more to do than I would if I were working at the office.

item.title: Window of tolerance
item.description: I have a therapist. Yes. Why? Oh, I could list a number of reasons, but suffice to say it is to better myself. I have some difficulties coping with extreme emotions, or at least emotions I perceive to be extreme. In discussing this, my therapist wanted to explain something to me. So she drew “the window of tolerance”. For some reason, this seemed so logical, and yet I had never realized this. It explained so much.
